ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT( $User.Bypass_Validation_Rules__c ),NOT(CONTAINS($Label.ALDSATRecordTypeIds,RecordType.DeveloperName)), OR( $RecordType.Id ='01220000000MDhj', $RecordType.Id ='01220000000MFwy', $RecordType.Id ='01220000000MG1A' ), ISBLANK(Detailed_Deficiency__c), OR( ISPICKVAL(Status, 'Closed with action plan'), ISPICKVAL(Status, 'Closed without action plan'), ISPICKVAL(Status, 'Closed') ), (TEXT( External_Case_Category__c )= 'Quality Management') )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: This field is mandatory. Please explain why there was a deficiency.
